results.no_results_announce: '{query}' ᐊᑐᕐᓗᒍ ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᓇᒦᓐᓂᖏᑦᑐᑦ. ᐱᔾᔪᑎᖓᓂᒃ ᐊᑐᕐᓗᓂ, ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐊᓯᖏᓐᓂᒃ ᐊᑦᑐᐊᔪᓂᒃ ᓂᕈᐊᕆᒋᐊᖃᕐᓂᐊᕈᑎᑦ.
results.no_results_body: ᐱᔾᔪᑎᖓᓂᒃ ᐊᑐᕐᓗᓂ (ᓲᕐᓗ 'button'), ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐊᓯᖏᓐᓂᒃ ᐊᑦᑐᐊᔪᓂᒃ (ᓲᕐᓗ 'input'), ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐊᓯᖏᓐᓂᒃ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᒃᑯᑕᓂᒃ ᐊᑐᕐᓂᐊᕐᓗᑎᑦ.
detail.refine_hint_ai: ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖁᔭᐅᔪᒥᒃ ᐅᖃᖅᓯᒪᕕᑦ ᐊᒻᒪ AI ᑎᑎᕋᖅᑕᐅᒃᑲᓂᕐᓗᓂ ᐊᒻᒪ ᐃᓚᓕᐅᔾᔨᓗᓂ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐱᒋᐊᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ. AI ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᒃᑯᑦ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᑕᐅᔪᖅ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᒪᑐᓯᒪᑎᑦᑎᔪᒃᑯᑦ
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Nalunaarusiorfigineqarsinnaassusiat allassimapput, imaluunniit allaaserisariuk. IA atoruk
detail.rewrite_aria: ᐊᓪᓚᕕᒃ ᐃᓗᐊᒍᑦ ᐃᓚᓕᐅᔾᔨᓗᓂ ᐊᒻᒪ AI ᑐᙵᕕᒃᑯᑦ ᓂᕈᐊᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᑕᐅᓗᑎᒃ
detail.confirm_reset_body: ᐊᔪᖅᓯᒪᔪᒥᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᓯᒪᒍᑎᒃ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᒥᒃ. ᐊᓂᒍᖅᑎᑦᑎᓗᒋᑦ ᐱᔭᕇᖅᓯᒪᔪᑎᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ ᑕᒪᕐᒥᒃ ᕿᒥᕐᕈᐊᖅᑕᐅᔪᓂᒃ.
settings.heading: Nalunaarusiorfigineqarsinnaassusiat

settings.privacy_body_1: Uvannamut, tamarmik localStorage atilirlugu qanuginnaujumik suli titiraqtaujuq. Nalinginnaujumik uvannamut amigaanngittuq. Titiraqtaujumik nalunaarusiangit ilinniarpaat: uqausiit, oqaatsit, suliarvik naapertuinnaq, Live Search nalunaarusiangit, AI nalunaarusiaqarfissait piumasaminnik, API uqausiit, nalunaarusiaqarfissait, ulluriaqarsinnaujumit, titiraqtaujumit uqautissait, naapertinnaujumit uqautissait, kingornussaminnik nalunaarusiangit, nalinginnaujumik nalunaarusiangit, inuiaqatigiit nalunaarusiangit alianait, amigait kingornussaminnik nalunaarusiangit.
settings.privacy_body_2: API uqausiit qanuginnaujumik suli titiraqtaujuq tamarmik uvannamut AI nalunaarusiaqarfissainnut sivuliqtitaujumik naliliurutissaminnik. Nalinginnaujumik tamanna tigumiarlugu. Uqausiit tamarmik AI nalunaarusiait ilinniarnissaminnik atuqtailitigut, amigait suli qanuginnaujumik nalunaarusiangit atuqtailitigut.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI oqaatsit amigait inuiaqatigiit nalunaarusiangit AI atilirlugu oqaatsit tamarmik titiraqtaujuq amigaanngittuq. Nalinginnaujumik inuiaqatigiit uqautissait, nalinginnaujumik nalunaarusiangit, amigait inuiaqatigiit alianait tamarmik oqaatsit sivuliqtitaujumanngikkaluarluni.
settings.reduced_motion_note: Reduced motion pilersitsinneqarpoq. Animations confetti-inik nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani. Nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani, OS-ip accessibility settings-iminni reduced motion nalunaarusiorfiginerani.

notfound.body: ᐅᑯᐊ ᒪᑉᐱᒐᖅ ᐃᓱᒪᒋᔭᐅᔪᖅ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᙱᓚᖅ. ᐊᒃᑐᐊᓂᓕᒃ ᓯᕗᓪᓕᕐᒧᑦ ᒪᑉᐱᒐᕐᒧᑦ ᐅᑎᕐᓗᑎᑦ.

kofi.title: Ko-fi suliassarsiorissavaa widget
about.what_body: Maanna nalunaarusiorfiginerani manualinik nalilersuiffigeqqissariarlugit nassatarisassianik nalunaarusiorfigineq. Ujarleqqissavat takugassaminnik, nalunaarusiorfigineq naapertoqqittaasoq nassatarisassiat tigummissavat aamma nalunaarusiorfigimminnut koopiissavat.
about.what_wcag: Nalunaarusiorfiginerani WCAG 2.2 Level A aamma AA tungaatigut nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfigineq, katillugit nalunaarusiorfiginerani naapertoqqittarissapput aamma tamarmik nalunaarusiorfiginerani naapertoqqittarissapput. Nassatarisassiat Level AAA Success Criteria nalunaarusiorfiginerani nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani naapertoqqittarissapput.
about.step_2_body: ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᓄᑦ ᐅᖓᓯᒃᑕᖅᑐᒃᑯᑦ/ᐊᑖᓃᑦᑐᒃᑯᑦ ᐃᒃᐱᒋᔭᐅᓂᖓᓂᒃ ᒪᓕᒃᑐᒥᒃ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ. ᐊᖏᓛᒃᑯᑦ ᓴᖅᑭᑕᐅᔪᒃᑯᑦ ᑕᑯᔭᐅᖁᔭᐅᒍᕕᐅᒃ. ᐃᒻᒥᒃᑯᑦ ᑕᑯᔭᐅᙱᒃᑲᓗᐊᖅᑐᒃᑯᑦ ᐊᓪᓚᒡᕕᒃᑯᑦ.
about.step_3_body: ᐊᖏᓛᒥᒃ ᐊᔾᔨᒌᖅᑐᒥᒃ ᑐᓴᕈᑕᐅᔪᒥᒃ ᓂᕈᐊᕐᓗᑎᑦ. ᓄᑖᑦ ᖃᐅᔨᒪᔭᐅᔭᕆᐊᓕᑦ ᐊᑐᐃᓐᓇᕈᖅᑎᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐊᑦᑕᑐᕐᓂᖏᓐᓄᑦ.
about.step_4_body: ᐃᓂᓕᖅᑐᒃᑯᑦ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᒃᑯᑦ (ᓲᕐᓗ "Global:") ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ AI ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᒃᑯᑦ ᐅᖃᐅᑎᔾᔪᑎᓂᒃ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓱᐃᔪᒃᑯᑦ.
about.feature_ai_body: AI atorlugit nassatarisat allannguissavat oqaatsit nassatarisassianik nalunaarusiorfiginerani. API key-inik Anthropic, OpenAI, imaluunniit Google-mit pissarsiarissavat. Browserimi nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani tigummissavat aamma nunaminnut nassatarisassianngikkaluarluni. Nalunaarusiorfiginerani
about.feature_languages_body: Nalunaarusiorfiginerani 50-inik oqaatsit nalunaarusiorfiginerani RTL-imik naapertoqqittarissapput oqaatsit nalunaarusiorfiginerani. Oqaatsit, kulturikkut aamma linguistikkikkut nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineq. Oqaatsit tamarmik nalunaarusiorfiginerani nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfigineq, nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineq, nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineq. Nalunaarusiorfiginerani AI-imik nalunaarusiorfigineq, oqaatsit naapertoqqittarissapput nalunaarusiorfiginerani. Nalunaarusiorfiginerani
about.feature_a11y_label: Nalunaarusiorfigineq Silarsuarmi Naapertoqqittarissaneq aamma AI Kingornussiarineq
about.feature_a11y_body: WCAG 2.2 tungaatigut nalunaarusiorfigineq. Focus management, live regions, keyboard navigation tamarmik, reduced motion naapertoqqittarissapput aamma high-contrast color tokens nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani.

about.step_5_body: ᐅᓂᒃᑳᕐᒥᒃ ᐊᒻᒪ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓯᔾᔪᑎᓂᒃ ᑎᑎᖅᑲᒥᒃ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐅᓂᒃᑳᕐᒧᑦ ᐊᑐᕈᓐᓇᕐᓂᐊᕐᒪᑦ ᑐᓗᕆᐊᕐᓗᒍ.
detail.revise_error_body: ᐊᒃᓱᕈᕐᓇᕐᓂᖅ ᐱᓕᕆᐊᖅᑕᐅᓂᐊᖅᑎᓪᓗᒍ. ᐃᓄᐊᖅᓯᓗᒍ ᐃᓗᐊᒍᑦ ᐃᓚᓕᐅᔾᔨᓗᓂ & ᐋᖅᑭᒃᑕᐅᓗᓂ ᓂᕈᐊᖅᑕᐅᔪᓂᒃ ᐊᕝᕙᒻᒪᕆᒃᓯᒪᔪᓄᑦ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐊᑐᓂᕕᒋᓗᒍ.
settings.api_key_error: ᐊᒃᓱᕈᕐᓇᕐᓂᖅ: API ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᐅᑏᑦ ᐱᔭᕆᐊᖃᖅᑐᖅ AI ᐃᑲᔪᖅᑐᐃᓂᖅ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᓂᐊᖅᑎᓪᓗᒍ.
error.heading: ᐊᒃᓱᕈᕐᓇᕐᓂᖅ ᐱᓕᕆᐊᖅᑕᐅᓂᐊᖅᑎᓪᓗᒍ
error.body: The defect library could not be loaded. Check your connection and
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᒃᑯᑦ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᒍᓐᓇᙱᑦᑐᖅ API ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᐅᑏᑦ ({provider}). ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑎᑦᑎᓂᖅ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᐅᑎᑦ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓱᐃᔪᓄᑦ.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᒍᓐᓇᐅᑎᑦ ᑕᒪᓐᓇ ᐱᓕᕆᐊᖃᕈᓐᓇᙱᑦᑐᖅ ({provider}). ᑭᓯᐊᓂ ᐊᓂᒃᓴᐊᓗᒃ ᐊᕝᕙᒻᒪᕆᒃᓯᒪᔪᓄᑦ.
settings.reset_all_announce: Tamarmik Nalunaarusiait Nutaanniksiutigijait amigait Uqausiit Naapertinnaujumit Atuqtailitigut.
about.what_body_2: ᐊᔾᔨᒌᑦᑎᐊᕐᓂᖅ ᓱᒻᒪᑐᖅ ᐱᕚᓪᓕᕐᑎᑦᑎᔪᖅ, ᐱᓗᐊᖅᑐᒥᒃ ᑖᒃᑯᓇᓂ ᐃᖅᑲᓇᐃᔮᖑᔪᓂᒃ, ᐊᒻᒪ ᐊᔾᔨᒌᑦᑎᐊᖁᓚᐅᕋᒃᑯ ᐊᒃᑐᐊᔪᓄᑦ, ᖃᓄᐃᓕᖓᔪᓄᑦ, ᐅᓂᒃᑳᕐᓄᑦ, ᐊᒻᒪ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓯᔾᔪᑎᑦᑎᐊᕙᐅᓗᑎᒃ ᐅᖃᐅᓯᐅᓲᓄᑦ ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑎᑦᑎᓂᕐᒧᑦ ᐱᓕᕆᐊᒃᓴᓄᑦ. WCAG-ᒧᑦ ᐊᔾᔨᒌᖅᑎᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ ᑐᓴᕈᑕᐅᔪᓂᒃ ᕿᓂᕐᓗᑎᑦ, ᐊᖏᓛᒥᒃ ᐊᔾᔨᒌᖅᑐᒥᒃ ᓂᕈᐊᕐᓗᑎᑦ, ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᓯᓗᑎᒃ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᐱᒋᐊᕈᑎᑦᑎᐊᕙᐅᔪᓂᒃ ᐃᓚᓕᐅᑎᓗᑎᑦ, ᐊᒻᒪ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᒥ ᖃᐅᔨᓴᖅᑕᐅᓂᕐᒧᑦ ᐅᓂᒃᑳᕐᒧᑦ ᑎᑎᕋᐅᑎᒋᓗᒍ.
error.announce: Nalinginnaujumik alianait. Nalunaarusiangit titiraqtaujumik atuliqqinnaujumik nalunaarusiangit tamarmik atuliqqinnaujumik. Nalunaarusiangit qanuginnaujumik naliliurutissaminnik uqausiinni nutaanniksiutissavait.
about.sources_body: Entries are written in plain language, near-duplicates are consolidated, and each is aligned to a specific WCAG success criterion. Sources consulted include:
detail.copy_all_aria: ᐅᖃᓪᓚᒍᑎᒃ ᐊᒻᒪ ᐊᑐᕈᓐᓇᖅᑐᖅ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓯᒍᑎᒃ ᑲᑎᒪᑎᓪᓗᒋᒃ ᑐᒃᓯᕋᕈᑎᒃ
detail.copy_all_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: ᐅᖃᓪᓚᒍᑎᒃ ᐊᒻᒪ ᐊᑐᕈᓐᓇᖅᑐᖅ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓯᒍᑎᒃ ᓄᑖᒧᑦ ᐊᓂᒍᖅᑎᑦᑎᔪᑎᒃ
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: [EN] Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally on this device and private to you. Other languages will be AI-translated unless you edit them manually — translations only run during site maintenance.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit will be queued for the maintainer to review before it becomes part of the shared corpus.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages will be re-translated from the updated English on the next translation pass.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Other languages will show AI-translated text. Translations are updated only during site maintenance.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version of the same finding. Make any edits and save, or skip to leave the English version unchanged.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Show or hide entries introduced in each WCAG version.
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
common.sponsored_body: Nalunaarusiassanik tigummissarpat accessibility-mik atuliornissaminnik suliaqarfiit atorfigeqqinnissaminnik. Privativiit naliginnaanngitsumik nalunngissumillu atugarissaarneqarsinnaanngillat, nalilersorneqarsinnaanngillat, nalilersorneqarsinnaanngillat.
onboarding.heading: A11yFred-imut tikilluaritsi
onboarding.slide_1_body: Takusoqarsinnaanngitsumik nalunngissumillu nalilersorneqarsinnaanngitsumik nalinginaasumik uqalimaanngittoqarpoq: siunissaminnik atorneqarsinnaanngitsumik, nalunaarusiassaq, wangaluunniit WCAG-imi naapersinneqarsinnaanngitsumik. Platform-imi wangaluunniit WCAG Level-imi nalilersoqqissaartitsisoqatigiissitissavigit corpus-imik ujarialinngurneqarsinnaanngitsumik. Narrow Results atorlugu nalilersorneqarsinnaanngitsumik tamatumunnga takusinnaanngitsumik ujarialinngurneqarsinnaanngitsoq. Nalilersorneqarsinnaanngitsumit naapersinneqarsinnaanngitsumik nalilersoqqissaarineqarsinnaanngitsumit nalunaarusiassanik ujarialinngurneqarsinnaanngitsumik.
onboarding.slide_2_body: Rank Up/Down atorlugu nalilersorneqarsinnaanngitsumik nalilersoqqissaarineqarsinnaanngitsumik ujarialinngurneqarsinnaanngitsumik. Nalunaarusiassaq siulleqissumik takuussineqarsinnaanngitsumik nalilersoqqissaartissavigit. Nalunaarusiassaq nalilersoqqissaartissavigit tamatumunnga ujarialinngurneqarsinnaanngitsumik nassatarisassaminnik.
onboarding.slide_3_body: ᐊᔪᖅᓯᒪᔪᒥᒃ ᐅᖄᓚᐅᑎᒥᒃ ᐅᒃᐱᕆᔭᐅᔪᒥᒃ ᑕᑯᒋᐊᕈᑎᖃᕐᓗᓂ ᐃᓂᖓᓂᒃ, WCAG ᓇᓗᓇᐃᒃᑯᑕᖓᓂᒃ, ᐅᓂᒃᑳᖓᓂᒃ, ᐊᒻᒪᓗ ᑐᑭᒧᐊᒃᑎᑦᑎᔾᔪᑎᖓᓂᒃ. ᐃᓂᖓᓄᑦ ᓯᕗᓪᓕᖅᐸᐅᔾᔪᑎᒥᒃ ᐃᓚᐅᑎᓗᒍ ᐅᓂᒃᑳᒧᑦ (ᓲᕐᓗ 'Global:'). AI Assist ᐊᑐᕐᓗᒍ ᑭᓯᐊᓂ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕈᑎᖃᕐᓗᓂ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᒃᑯᑕᓕᒫᓂᒃ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᑕᑎᓐᓂᒃ ᐊᑐᕐᓗᓂ, ᑭᖑᓂᐊᒍᑦ ᓴᓂᐊᓂᓕᒫᒥᒃ ᑐᓂᓯᒍᓐᓇᑐᑎᑦ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ Copy All ᐊᑐᕐᓗᒍ ᑕᒪᒃᑮᓂᒃ ᓇᐃᒡᓕᒋᐊᕐᓗᒍ.
search.hint_ranking: Rank Up/Down atorlugu nalilersorneqarsinnaanngitsumik nalilersoqqissaarineqarsinnaanngitsumik ujarialinngurneqarsinnaanngitsumik. Nalunaarusiassaq siulleqissumik takuussineqarsinnaanngitsumik nalilersoqqissaartissavigit.
search.hint_syntax_prefix: +term atorlugu nalunaarusiassaq nassatarisassaminnik wangaluunniit -term atorlugu nassatarisassaminnik nalilersoqqissaartissavigit (tamaani:
search.view_all_confirm_archived: {count} ᐊᕐᓇᖅᑐᑦ ᐊᒻᒪ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᓂᐊᖅᑐᑦ ᒪᓕᒃᑐᒥ ᑭᓯᐊᓂ ᓯᕗᓪᓕᐅᔭᐅᑎᓪᓗᒍ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ ᒪᑯᓂᖓ.
results.sort_live_hint: ᑕᑯᓐᓇᖅᑐᒥᒃ ᓂᕆᐅᓐᓂᖃᕐᓂᖅ ᐃᓂᒃᓴᖃᖅᑐᖅ. ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᒐᓱᓐᓂᐊᖅᑐᑦ ᐃᓛᒃᑰᖓᑎᑦᓯᓂᖅ ᐊᓂᒍᐃᓪᓗᒍ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᓂᕆᐅᒋᔭᐅᔪᒥᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᓯᒪᑎᑕᐅᓪᓗᑎᒃ.
results.sort_smart_info: ᖃᐅᔨᒪᔭᐅᔪᒥᒃ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᐊᑦᔨᒌᙱᑦᑑᑎᑦᓯᕗᑦ ᓴᙱᓂᖓ ᓯᕗᓪᓕᖅᐸᒡᓗᒍ, ᑕᐃᒪᐃᓐᓂᖓᓄᑦ ᐃᓕᑕᕆᔭᐅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᒥᒃ. ᓯᕗᓪᓕᐅᑎᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᓂᐊᖅᑐᑦ ᖁᓛᒍᑦ; ᐊᕐᓇᖅᑐᑦ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᓂᐊᖅᑐᑦ ᐊᑖᒍᑦ. ᑕᒪᓐᓇ ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᖅ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᒧᑦ.
results.sort_wcag_level_info: AAA ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᓄᖅᑲᖓᑎᑦᓯᒐᓱᐊᖅᑐᑦ ᑕᒪᒃᑯᓂᖓ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ. ᐊᑕᐅᓯᐅᙱᑦᑐᑦ AAA ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑎᑦᓯᔪᑦ, ᐊᒻᒪ ᐃᓚᖏᑦ AAA ᐊᑎᒋᔭᐅᔪᑦ ᐊᑦᔨᒌᓂᖓᓂᒃ ᑐᑭᓯᐊᔭᖅᑑᓪᓗᑎᒃ ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᑭᓯᐊᓂ ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᒥᒃ.
results.sort_popularity_info: ᓱᓕᔪᒥᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᐸᓪᓕᐊᔪᒥᒃ, ᑕᒪᓐᓇ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑎᑦᓯᓂᐊᖅᑐᖅ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑦᓯᐊᖅᑐᒥᒃ ᓄᓇᕐᔪᐊᒥ ᐱᔭᕇᖅᑕᐅᒐᓗᐊᕐᓂᖓᓂᒃ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᓪᓗᑎᒃ ᑕᒪᒃᑯᓂᖓ ᐱᓕᕆᕕᐅᔪᓂᒃ. ᒫᓐᓇ, ᐱᔭᕇᖅᑕᐅᒐᓗᐊᕐᓂᖓ ᐊᑐᓕᖅᑎᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᖅ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᓪᓗᑎᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᑕᐅᓂᐊᖅᑐᖅ ᐊᑐᕐᓂᐊᕐᕕᐅᔪᖅ ᒪᑐᐃᖅᑕᐅᒃᑯᑎᒃ.
results.rank_hint: ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᖁᕝᕙᓯᑦᓯᐊᕈᓐᓇᖅᑐᑦ ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ ᓄᖅᑲᖓᑎᑦᓯᔪᑦ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᐊᑦᑐᐊᓂᖃᖅᑎᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ. ᓯᕗᓪᓕᐅᑎᑦᓯᓗᑎᒃ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑎᑦᓯᓗᑎᒃ. ᐊᕐᓇᕐᓗᑎᒃ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᙱᑦᑎᑦᓯᓗᑎᒃ. (ᐅᑎᖅᑎᑕᐅᔪᓐᓇᖅᑐᑦ.)
results.unpin_from_search: ᑕᒪᓐᓇ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᔭᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᖅ ᐃᓂᒃᓴᖃᖅᑐᖅ. ᓄᖅᑲᖓᑎᑦᓯᓗᑎᒃ ᓂᕆᐅᓐᓂᖃᕐᓂᖅ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔭᕆᐊᖃᖅᑐᒥᒃ.
detail.discard_confirm_body: ᓄᑖᖅ ᓇᓗᓇᐃᖅᓯᒪᔪᖅ ᐊᒻᒪᓗ ᑭᓯᐊᓂ ᐅᐸᒃᑐᓂ ᒫᓐᓇᐅᔪᖅ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᖅ ᐊᑯᓂᐅᔪᖅ ᐊᑲᖅᑎᑦᑎᕙᒡᓗᓂ ᐊᒻᒪ ᐊᓂᒍᓐᓇᖅᑎᑦᑎᔪᓐᓇᖅᑐᓂᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ.
detail.ai_revision_hint: ᐊᓯᔾᔨᖅᑕᐅᔪᓂᒃ ᓂᕈᐊᕐᓗᒋᑦ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᑕᐅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐊᒃᓱᐊᓗᒃ, ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᑎᑦ ᐅᕗᖓ ᐃᓚᓕᐅᔾᔨᓗᒍ, ᐊᒻᒪ AI ᑕᒡᕙᓂ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕐᓂᐊᖅᑐᖅ. AI ᐊᑐᕆᐊᓕᑦ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕈᒪᒍᑎᒃ ᐅᕝᕙᓗᓐᓃᑦ ᓄᖅᑲᖅᑎᑦᑎᒍᒪᒍᑎᒃ, ᐅᕗᖓ ᐊᐅᓚᓗᑎᑦ
detail.finding_note_hint: ᑭᓯᐊᓂ ᑐᓴᖅᑎᑦᑎᔪᑦ ᑎᑎᕋᕐᓗᒍ: ᓇᓗᓇᐃᒃᑯᑕᒃ, ᐊᔪᕐᓇᖅᑑᑉ ᐱᒻᒪᕆᐅᓂᖓ, ᐅᕝᕙᓗᓐᓃᑦ ᐱᓕᕆᐊᒧᑦ ᐃᓚᒋᔭᐅᔪᑦ. AI ᐃᑲᔪᖅᑏᑦ ᐊᒃᓱᐊᓗᒃ
detail.ai_revision_placeholder: ᑐᑭᓯᓇᓛᖑᔪᖅ: ᑕᒪᓐᓇ ᐅᑎᖅᑐᒧᑦ ᐃᓱᒪᒋᔭᐅᔪᖅ, ᐃᓗᓕᒃ ᑐᑭᓯᓇᓛᖑᔪᖅ
detail.finding_note_placeholder: ᑐᑭᓯᓇᓛᖑᔪᖅ: ᐊᔪᕐᓇᖅᑑᑉ ᐱᒻᒪᕆᐅᓂᖓ, ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐊᒥᓱᒐᓚᒃᑯᑦ Onboarding ᓯᓚᑦᑐᖅᓴᕐᕕᒃ. ᐊᔪᕐᓇᙱᓛᖑᔪᑦ ᐱᒻᒪᕆᐅᓂᖓ ᓇᐃᓴᖅᑕᐅᓂᐊᖅᑐᑦ ᑕᒪᒃᑯᓂᙵᑦ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓯᒪᔪᓂᒃ.
detail.ai_revision_aria: AI ᐊᑐᕆᐊᓕᑦ ᐃᓚᓕᐅᔾᔨᓗᒋᑦ ᐊᒻᒪ ᓂᕈᐊᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᓯᒪᔪᑦ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕈᑎᒃ
detail.ai_revision_error_body: ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕐᓂᐊᖅᑐᒥ ᓱᕈᓯᔭᐅᓯᒪᔪᖅ. ᐃᓚᓕᐅᔾᔨᓗᒍ & ᓂᕈᐊᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕈᑎᒃ ᐊᑐᕆᐊᓕᒃ ᑎᑎᕋᕆᐊᖅᑐᖅ.
detail.ai_revision_error_invalid_key: ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᙱᓐᓂᖅᓴᖅ ᐅᕝᕙᓗᓐᓃᑦ ᐊᑯᓂᐅᔪᒥᒃ API ᐊᑎᖓ ({provider}). ᐊᑎᖓ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑎᑦᑎᓗᒍ ᐋᖅᑭᒃᓯᒪᔪᒥ.
detail.ai_revision_error_rate_limit: ᐊᑐᖅᑕᐅᔪᑦ ᐃᒃᐱᒋᔭᐅᒻᒪᕆᒃᑐᑦ ᑭᒃᑯᓕᒫᒧᑦ ({provider}). ᐊᑯᓂᐊᓗᒃ ᒪᑐᐃᖓᑎᓪᓗᒍ ᐊᑐᕆᐊᖅᑐᖅ.
detail.ai_revision_error_network_error: ᐃᐅᓐᑐᕆᓐᒧᑦ ᑲᑎᒪᔾᔪᑏᑦ ᐃᓪᓗᑐᐃᓐᓇᖅ. ᑲᑎᒪᔾᔪᑎᑎᑦ ᑕᑯᒃᓴᐅᑎᑦᑎᓗᒍ ᐊᑐᕆᐊᖅᑐᖅ.
help.take_tour_description: A11yFred qanoq atugassianik nalunaarusiorfigissavat oninneqartitaasoq nutaamik takugassavat.
help.step_1_body: Nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalinginnaasumik nassatarisassiat naapertoqqittaarissavat. Paasisinnaavat Nalunaarusiorfigineq tungaatigut Settings-imi Platform-imik filter atorlugu Web imaluunniit Native App-imik nassatarisassiat tigummissagassannik (atugarissaarnerit amerlanerannik web-imik tunngassuteqarpoq). +oqaatsit atorlugit oqaatsit nassatarisassanngortissavat imaluunniit -oqaatsit atorlugit nassatarisassanngortinneqassasoqanngikkaluarluni (nl. keyboard +screen reader -wcag2.2).
help.step_2_body: Nassatarisassiat tamarmik Rank Up aamma Rank Down-imik paasissutissanik nalunaarusiorfigineq naapertoqqissaarissavat. Nassatarisat atorlugit nassatarisat silaannaasumik naapertortissavat. Nassatarisat Pin-inik atorlugit ujarleqqinnissaminni naapertorneqassasoq tigummissavat.
help.step_3_body: Nassatarisat takugassaminnik annaatissaminnik naapertoqqittaanissaminnik atorissavat. Nassatarisassiat naapertorneqarsinnaasumillu tunngassuteqarsinnaasumillu nassatarisassiat naapertortissavat, kingornussiarineq kingornussiariarlugu.
help.step_4_body: ᐃᓂᖓᓄᑦ ᓯᕗᓪᓕᖅᐸᐅᔾᔪᑎᒥᒃ ᐃᓚᐅᑎᓗᒍ ᐅᓂᒃᑳᒧᑦ (ᓲᕐᓗ 'Global:' ᐅᕝᕙᓘᓐᓃᑦ 'Cart:'). AI Assist ᐊᑐᖅᑐᓂ, ᑎᑎᕋᖅᑕᑎᓐᓂᒃ Revision Notes ᐃᓂᒧᑦ ᐃᓚᐅᑎᓗᒍ ᐊᒻᒪᓗ AI ᑕᒪᒃᑭᓂᒃ ᐊᓯᔾᔨᕐᓂᐊᖅᑐᖅ ᑎᑎᕋᖅᑕᑎᑦ ᑐᑭᒧᐊᒃᑎᑦᑎᔾᔪᑎᒋᓗᒋᑦ.
help.step_5_body: Nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineq aamma siunnersuissiissitissanngortinneqarsinnaasumik koopiissavat spreadsheet-iminnut imaluunniit nalunaarusiorfigimminnut. Copy All atorlugit suliassaq tamarmik tigummissavat.
help.shortcuts_note: Nassatarisassiat nassatarisassiat nalilersuiffigeqqissariarlugit atorneqassapput. Nassatarisassiat nalilersuiffigeqqinnissaminnik atorissavat nassatarisassiat nalilersuiffigeqqissariarlugit.
about.what_body_2_prefix: Sumiiffillu nalunaarusiorfiginerani naapertoqqittaanissaminnik nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfigineq naapertoqqittarissapput. Suliassaq nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineq naapertoqqittarissapput nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani suliassaq silarsuarmi nalunaarusiorfigineq. Nalunaarusiorfiginerani nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineq, AI-imik oqaatsit naapertoqqissaarissavat, naapertorneqarsinnaasumillu nalunaarusiorfigineq naapertoqqittarissapput
about.feature_agentic_body: Claude (Anthropic) atorinnaavat, Match Existing Style pilersitsinneqarsinnaasumik nassatarisassiat tigummissavat. AI-ip siulliit allannguissariarlugit nassatarisassiat naapertoqqittarissavat nalunaarusiorfiginerani naapertoqqittarissapput, nassatarisat allannguissanngitsoorsinnaavat.
settings.language_rhg_body_1: Nalunaarusiorfiginerani AI-imik nalunaarusiorfigineq aamma Rohingya oqaatsinik nalunaarusiorfiginerani nalunaarusiorfigineqarsinnaanngikkaluarluni.
settings.language_rhg_body_2: Rohingya inuit genocide-imik aamma nassatarisassiat naapertoqqittarissapput. Nalunaarusiorfiginerani oqaatsit atorissavat, aamma nalunaarusiorfiginerani allannguissariarlugit nassatarisassiat nalunaarusiorfiginerani.
settings.platform_all_desc: Nassatarisassiat tamarmik web, native apps, aamma nalunaarusiorfiginerani takugassaminnik.
settings.starred_results_desc: Ulluriaqarsinnaujumik uqautissait tamarmik sivulingannik qaijutigivait, ulluriaqarsinnaujumingnik titiqqinnaujumik.
settings.archived_results_desc: Titiraqtaujumik uqautissait tamarmik kingornussaminnik nalunaarusiainni naapertitaujuapput.
settings.rankings_desc: Atulirijauluni nalunaarusiaqarfissait tamarmik nalunaarusiangit piumasaminnik. Nalunaarusiaqarfissait silatunngissusiat asiginginnainnaujumit sivuliqtitaujuq, sivulingajumik uqausiinni naapertitaujuq.
